summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for requested bug-fix round. Verified delete user flow in settings, archive flow with explicit 2-step modal, comma-separated options handling for select/multiselect variable inputs, and variable delete removing both config row and placeholder tokens from section/subsection text.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for this requested scope.
Optional maintainability: split oversized files (TemplatesPage.jsx and backend/server.py) into smaller modules.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/TemplatesPage.jsx exceeds 700 lines; split into focused editor/list/modal components.
/app/backend/server.py exceeds 700 lines; split by domain routers/services for maintainability and lower regression risk.
Requested optional auth playbook file /app/auth_testing.md was not present in workspace.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary UI/API test artifacts: user ui_r8_* (deleted in-flow), template TEST_UI_R8_*, and archived one active template during archive modal validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI validation used admin credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and validated all requested bug flows end-to-end on public URL. Note: archive test used the first active template available at runtime.
rca of the issue: No remaining defects reproduced for requested scope. Regression confirms fixes are active in both UI behavior and backend endpoint execution.
